---
title: "Coming soon!"
image: "nipLogo_2022.png"
color1: "#5A59A3"
color2: "#C66060"
site: bookdown
# output: 
#   html_document:
#     css: "assets/css/CSSBackground.css"
---

Welcome to our new skate company based in Canberra, ACT.

**Be one of the first to skate our boards!**

```{r setup, include=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# knitr::include_graphics("assets/imgs/bg4.jpg")
```


# {.tabset .tabpills}

```{r child = "preorder.Rmd"}

```


```{r child = "contact.Rmd"}

```


```{r child = "README.md"}

```
